Pipeline Operational Status for February 4, 2026 08:30 CCT


Notice Text:

Linepack Status - Critical

System Linepack - 3,423 MMCF

Target Linepack - 3,200 MMCF

Forecasted Linepack - 3,350 MMCF

Physical Operations Notes: Linepack increased overnight to an unhealthy level and is expected to decrease today.

Commercial Operations Notes: Shippers must trend their accounts into tolerance.

The Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status can be found in LINK under: Customer Activities > Flowing Gas > Imbalance > Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status.
